prompt: bal-converge 본격적으로 돌리기 전에 방향성 한번 잡아줘. 지난번 max_iter로 끝났었는데 이번엔 KPI랑 만질 knob을 좀 정리하고 들어가고 싶음.

assertions.text: plan.md file exists and is non-trivial (>500 chars)
Plan contains a recommended /bal-converge command on a copy-pasteable line
Recommended command includes a kpi= argument
Plan references the prior converge report history (mentions max_iter or a prior report timestamp/reason)
Plan surfaces at least one memory trap (enemy_damage int round-trip OR Ghost burst spawn / structural cutoff)
Knob whitelist section references actual knob ids from .claude/bal-apply.json (e.g. enemy_damage, spawn_rate, level_up_xp_increment) — not invented names
Plan does NOT claim /bal-converge was executed (single-pass guarantee)
